subject: fix: resolve 15 bugs from codebase review across UI, auth, data, and DB layers
body:
Critical fixes:
- DB trigger SECURITY DEFINER + price change guard (RLS was blocking price_history inserts)
- Auth getSession catch prevents infinite loading spinner on network errors
- Station detail: guard against undefined id, bound price_history query, safe tel: links
- usePriceHistory: request ID pattern prevents stale data on rapid fuel type switching
- PriceHistoryChart: reset selectedFuelType when prices prop changes (station navigation)
- BottomSheet: use ref for keyboard visibility to fix stale closure in visualViewport handler
- Admin layout: render loading state during redirect to prevent content flash
- Admin station list: separate initial load from refresh to preserve list during pull-to-refresh
- showAlert: add Promise<boolean> overload for two-arg confirm pattern (was void)
- usePersistedState: support functional updater pattern for derived state updates

Minor fixes:
- share.ts: robust cancel detection via err.name + coordinate validation
- PriceTrend: use theme colors for dark mode contrast + React.memo
- BurgerMenu: fix double border, catch async errors in setTimeout callbacks
- LocationSearch: clean up blur timer on unmount, add maxHeight to recent searches
- useRecentSearches: validate coordinates against NaN/Infinity

Tags: bugfix, security, ui, data-integrity, dark-mode, auth
Complexity: 4
Urgency: 4
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: codebase-review
Semver: patch
